trackingsummarydata.subject: This week in A&S: Corporate BS, quantum chaos and Giving Day
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 03/09/26

urls.page_title: Cornell Center for Social Sciences names 2026-27 Faculty Fellows | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: The Cornell Center for Social Sciences has selected 10 faculty members as 2026–27 Faculty Fellows, providing course release and funding to support interdisciplinary social science research with real-world impact.
urls.page_title: Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs
urls.page_summary: Employees who are impressed by vague corporate-speak like “synergistic leadership,” or “growth-hacking paradigms” may struggle with practical decision-making, a new Cornell study into “corporate BS” reveals.
urls.page_title: Planetary scientist Robert Sullivan dies at 63
urls.page_summary: Robert John Sullivan, Jr., one of the world’s foremost authorities on aeolian processes -- how wind can carve and change a landscape -- died Feb. 15 in Ithaca.
urls.page_title: Holding chaos at bay in the quantum world
urls.page_summary: Researchers have found that quantum systems in a frozen state can be stabilized long enough to be a useful strategy for preserving information before it disappears.
urls.page_title: Bad Bunny and the Politics of Culture - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Rebeca Hey-Colon Faculty ENGL, LSP, AMST
Paul Ortiz Faculty ILR, LSP, AMST
Sofia Alexandra Meadows-Muriel PhD Student Africana Studies
Isabel Padilla PhD Candidate PMA
Adolfho Romero PhD Candidate ILR
While celebrity culture won't save us,...
urls.page_title: Shop The Cornell Store For Arts & Sciences Merchandise
urls.page_summary: Shop The Cornell Store for Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences merchandise.
urls.page_title: ASL Lecture Series: Philip Bravin - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
The ASL Program at the Department of Linguistics proudly presents Philip Bravin, Trustee Emeritus at Gallaudet University. Dr. Bravin will present on "How the World Changed for the Deaf Community in 7 Days".
Controlling Our Destiny: A Board Memb...
urls.page_title: NY Times journalist to offer insights on White House reporting
urls.page_summary: New York Times White House correspondent Zolan Kanno-Youngs will share insights about his work covering immigration, homeland security, criminal justice and inequality in an event March 17 with Dean Peter John Loewen.
urls.page_title: Venezuelan Perspectives on U.S. Interventionism - Cornell
urls.page_summary: Recent U.S. military actions in Venezuela—including strikes on civilian boats, the seizure of oil tankers, and the abduction of President Nicolas Maduro—have raised questions about U.S. ambitions in Latin America and their implications for peace a...
urls.page_title: Spacecraft image center brings the universe to NYS
urls.page_summary: Cornell’s Spacecraft Planetary Image Facility (SPIF), which manages print and online images taken by NASA missions, supports astronomy research and conducts dozens of outreach events every year.
